cmd.openOrStart: Code Review: Open or Start Review
cmd.openInNewWindow: Code Review: Open in New Window
cmd.jumpToNextUnseen: Code Review: Jump to Next Unseen Line
config.language.auto: Follow the VS Code display language
config.language.description: Language for the whole Code Review experience — both the extension UI (status bar, prompts, panels) and all LLM output (findings, fix proposals, explanations, global conclusions). Command titles in the Command Palette follow the VS Code display language.
config.focusedWorkbench.description: When opening the Code Review workbench, close the side bar and hide the activity bar so the workbench takes over the main editor area; restored automatically when the workbench is closed.
